seo.title: Templates and checklists for scoping, takeover, and automation work...
seo.description: Overview of practical templates for web app briefs, app takeover, API integrations, internal tool scoping, and automation discovery.

page.title: Templates and checklists for scoping, takeover, and automation work | Bc. Ondřej Halata (halatao.cz)
page.h1: Templates and checklists that shorten the path to a better first project decision
page.description: Overview of practical templates for web app briefs, app takeover, API integrations, internal tool scoping, and automation discovery.
page.primaryQuery: Templates and checklists that shorten the path to a better first project decision

hero.title: Practical templates for getting structure around the project before confusion spreads
hero.subtitle: This section gathers useful working assets for scoping, takeover, internal tooling, and automation projects. The goal is clarity, not paperwork.

intro: These pages provide practical working inputs for early project decisions. They help buyers and teams organise the right questions before implementation or takeover begins.
The section includes a web app brief template, app takeover checklist, API checklist, internal tool scope worksheet, and automation discovery checklist.

sections.title: What this section covers
body: Each child page explains what the asset should cover, how to use it, and what type of decision quality it should improve.

sections.title: Who this section helps most
body: This section works as a supporting authority layer for buyers and teams that need better decisions around technology, templates, or local commercial context.
bullets: preparing for an intro call or scoping session
taking over an inherited application or incomplete project
internal tool and automation work with several unknowns

sections.title: How to continue from here
body: Open the child page closest to the current decision and then continue into the relevant service, comparison, or inquiry path.
bullets: choose the asset closest to the project situation
use it as a working input, not a decorative document
move to inquiry when you want help turning it into delivery

faq.question: Do these templates replace architecture or project planning?
faq.answer: No. They improve the quality of the starting frame but do not replace deeper technical and delivery work.

faq.question: Are they useful without an internal engineering team?
faq.answer: Yes. They help business-side buyers ask better questions and reduce blind spots early.

faq.question: Do they link into commercial next steps?
faq.answer: Yes. Every page connects back to the relevant services, guides, and inquiry path.

for: preparing for an intro call or scoping session
taking over an inherited application or incomplete project
internal tool and automation work with several unknowns
notFor: reading with no connection to a real software decision

cta.label: Discuss your project
cta.note: If this section connects to a live project, I can help frame the next step against your context.
